title: Meteor (frigate)
content:
{{Top|leg|italics=1}}
{{Youmay|the escort frigate|the [[Meteor/Legends|astronomical object]], the [[Meteor (Havoc Squad)|Havoc Squad trooper]], or [[Meteorite/Legends|meteorites]]}}
'''''Meteor''''' was a [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]] [[EF76 Nebulon-B escort frigate/Legends|Nebulon-B escort frigate]].

Participating in the [[Operation: Quick Strike]] with its squadrons of [[Z-95 Headhunter/Legends|Z-95 Headhunter]] [[Starfighter/Legends|starfighters]], it launched an attack on ''[[Drekker]]'', an [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] [[Deep Space Manufacturing Facility|X7 Factory Station]] in the [[Yerej system/Legends|Yerej system]] used for the production of valuable crystals.

The outcome of that attack is unknown.

==Behind the scenes==
As the player(s) can play for either side in the mission and the outcome depends on the player's actions, no canonical outcome can be determined.

==Appearances==
*''[[Star Wars: X-Wing vs. TIE Fighter]]''
